name: Bitrix24
description: Bitrix24 CRM integration — manage contacts, deals, tasks, and workflows via 5 stdlib Python scripts with 15 domain reference files. Business-first UX rules.
review: Highest quality in batch. 5 stdlib Python scripts with zero external dependencies, 15 deep domain reference files, bilingual documentation, business-first UX design. Strong CIS market fit. MCP used only for doc lookup — clean architecture.
